description_long: This sconce features a vertically elongated cylindrical lantern design with a metallic frame composed of several evenly spaced vertical rods. The top and bottom sections are capped with ornate, domed metal covers, giving it a vintage, classical appearance. The central light source is encased within the rods, and appears to be a tubular bulb, possibly with a filament visible through the transparent enclosure. The base of the sconce is robust and attaches to a circular mounting plate, suggesting it is designed for wall installation. The metallic finish is a dark bronze or antique brass, contributing to its old-world charm. Decorative finials and subtle ridges accentuate the fixture, enhancing its ornamental appeal.
description: A vintage-style cylindrical wall sconce with a dark metallic frame, domed caps, and a central tubular bulb encased by vertical rods. The fixture features ornate detailing and a robust circular wall mount.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of vertical rods, domed top, and the central tubular bulb clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the fixture, the circular wall mount, and the cylindrical profile of the lantern.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the domed cap and the alignment of the vertical rods, with the mounting base partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the mounting hardware and the cylindrical lantern's side profile.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a vintage, classical design with ornate domed caps and a cylindrical lantern body framed by vertical metal rods. Its dark metallic finish and decorative finials evoke an old-world, antique aesthetic.
